steps.title: Identify the starting amount
steps.content: At $t=0$, there are $272$ people in line, so the model starts at $272$.

steps.title: Use the decreasing rate
steps.content: The number of people in line decreases by $16$ each minute, so the slope is $-16$. The model is: $$p(t)=-16t+272$$ The answer is A.
